name: Bluesky (AT Protocol)
description: Bluesky/AT Protocol channel adapter. Normalizes incoming Bluesky mentions and firehose events into the standard YAOC2 ChannelMessage shape, and exposes post/reply/search tools. Designed as a drop-in channel alongside the Telegram and WhatsApp adapters.

credentials_required.label: Bluesky Handle
credentials_required.hint: Your full Bluesky handle, e.g. you.bsky.social

credentials_required.label: Bluesky App Password
credentials_required.hint: Generate at bsky.app → Settings → App Passwords. Do not use your main account password.

credentials_optional.label: PDS Base URL
credentials_optional.hint: Personal Data Server URL. Defaults to https://bsky.social. Change if using a self-hosted PDS.

tools.name: bluesky_post
tools.description: Post a new skeet to Bluesky. Enforces 300-character limit, strips markdown formatting.

tools.name: bluesky_reply
tools.description: Reply to a specific Bluesky post by AT URI.

tools.name: bluesky_search_mentions
tools.description: Search recent posts mentioning a handle or keyword on Bluesky.

tools.name: bluesky_normalize_event
tools.description: Normalize a raw Bluesky firehose or AppView event into a standard YAOC2 ChannelMessage. Output: {channel, user_id, display_name, text, thread_id, reply_to, timestamp}.

channel_message_schema.description: Standard shape all channel adapter tools output for ingestion by yaoc2 policy gateway

fields.user_id: string — platform-native user ID (DID for Bluesky)
fields.thread_id: string or null — platform thread/conversation ID
fields.reply_to: string or null — ID of message being replied to

author: JazenaYLA
notes: The channel_message_schema field defines the standard contract all channel adapter templates must conform to. When adding Twitter/X, Discord, or other channel adapters, ensure the normalize_event tool outputs this exact shape so yaoc2 ingress can consume all channels uniformly.
